system.notes:
Full-body conversion; index ✓118,110. Spec pp.~98-102: BODY 12, MA 12/20 versions, run 40mph, 6 limbs w/ SP25-30; sensor + cyberoptic packages. | [Audit row +223 — Chromebook 3 p.101]

Full Body Conversion (Chromebook 3 p.101). Whole-body cyborg chassis: takes Structural Damage per zone, not the human wound track - Head or Torso destroyed = the borg dies. SP 30 all zones; SDP disabled/destroyed = Head/limbs 20/30, Torso 30/40.

Option spaces: Head optic 0&0, audio 0; Torso 4; R.Arm 0/L.Arm 0; R.Leg 0/L.Leg 0.

Prebuilt options: Maximum-Metal recon suite: 5-optic front mount; head + shoulder sensory booms; acoustic alarm; military radio; parabolic mic; tight-beam laser comm; cellular phone; satellite uplink; raser scanner; A/V recorder; sniffer; radiation detector; remote targeting link; motion detectors; magnetometer; quick-change mount.

loadout.name: Front Optic Mount
loadout.description: Front-mounted optic package — holds up to five cyberoptics. Ships with Lowlight, Thermo, Telescopic, IR, and Times Square+. Swap optics in and out via the mount.

loadout.name: Lowlight Optic
loadout.description: Lowlight cyberoptic mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Thermo Optic
loadout.description: Thermographic cyberoptic mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Telescopic Optic
loadout.description: Telescopic cyberoptic mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: IR Optic
loadout.description: Infrared cyberoptic mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Times Square+ Optic
loadout.description: Times Square Marquee+ cyberoptic mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Head Sensory Boom
loadout.description: Head-mounted extensible sensory boom carrying both optic and audio sensors (split from the bundled Head + Shoulder Sensory-Boom package; the book lists no separate humanity cost for the booms). Hosts mixed cyberoptic/cyberaudio modules, with one free space beyond the fitted sensors.

loadout.name: Head Boom Optic
loadout.description: Optic sensor carried on the head sensory boom. The book does not itemize the boom's sensors beyond "optics/audio".

loadout.name: Head Boom Audio Sensor
loadout.description: Audio sensor carried on the head sensory boom. The book does not itemize the boom's sensors beyond "optics/audio".

loadout.name: Shoulder Sensory Boom
loadout.description: Shoulder-mounted extensible sensory boom carrying both optic and audio sensors (split from the bundled Head + Shoulder Sensory-Boom package; the book lists no separate humanity cost for the booms). Hosts mixed cyberoptic/cyberaudio modules, with one free space beyond the fitted sensors.

loadout.name: Shoulder Boom Optic
loadout.description: Optic sensor carried on the shoulder sensory boom. The book does not itemize the boom's sensors beyond "optics/audio".

loadout.name: Shoulder Boom Audio Sensor
loadout.description: Audio sensor carried on the shoulder sensory boom. The book does not itemize the boom's sensors beyond "optics/audio".

loadout.name: Acoustic Alarm
loadout.description: Acoustic alarm sensor that alerts to detected sound.

loadout.name: Military Radio
loadout.description: Built-in military radio transceiver.

loadout.name: Parabolic Mic
loadout.description: Parabolic microphone for long-range audio pickup.

loadout.name: Tight-Beam Laser Comm
loadout.description: Tight-beam laser communicator for secure line-of-sight comms.

loadout.name: Cellular Phone
loadout.description: Integrated cellular phone.

loadout.name: Satellite Uplink
loadout.description: Satellite uplink for global communications.

loadout.name: Raser Scanner
loadout.description: Raser scanner (radar/laser scanning sensor).

loadout.name: A/V Recorder
loadout.description: Audio/visual recorder for capturing the sensory feed.

loadout.name: Sniffer
loadout.description: Chemical sniffer for detecting airborne substances.

loadout.name: Radiation Detector
loadout.description: Radiation detector.

loadout.name: Remote Targeting Link
loadout.description: Remote targeting link for guiding weapons fire.

loadout.name: Motion Detectors
loadout.description: Motion detectors.

loadout.name: Magnetometer
loadout.description: Magnetometer for detecting magnetic fields and metal.

loadout.name: Quick-Change Weapon Mount (Right Arm)
loadout.description: Quick-change weapon mount in the right forearm for swappable weapons.

loadout.name: Variable-Spectrum Spotlight
loadout.description: Variable-spectrum spotlight.
